1.Title: Knight's Morale
1.Description: Increases CRIT Rate by <color=#2BAD00>20%</color>. When the equipper launches a <color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</color>, their <color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</color> increases by <color=#2BAD00>10%</color>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
